question_en: What did you make of that game?
How are you feeling? / How did it feel?
Can you talk us through the goal?
What did the manager say to you at half-time?
How pleased were you with the character and spirit the team showed?
Can you give us an update on [Player]'s injury / fitness?
How important was the atmosphere and the fans today?
Are you disappointed with the result / performance?
What was the game plan going into this match?
What did you see as the big differences between the first half and the second half?
How difficult was it playing with 10 men?
How do you cope with the busy schedule and fatigue?
How important is it to keep a clean sheet?
What was your view on the penalty / VAR decision?
How pleased are you with [Player]'s individual performance?
How are you finding your new positional role?
Where does this leave you in the title race / top 4 battle?
Did you expect that sort of physically intense game?
Does this win give you momentum going forward?
How proud are you of the young / academy players stepping up?
Can you explain the tactical tweaks you made?
What are your ambitions for the rest of the season?
How are the new signings settling in?
Is this a missed opportunity?
What does it mean to wear the captain's armband for this club?
How much do you work on set-pieces in training?
How do you handle the pressure of these big games?
How did you mentally deal with your recent injury setbacks?
What are your thoughts on the opponent's performance?
What is your message to the supporters?
How has the manager helped your game?
Does the manager spend time with you one-to-one?
What makes the difference in tight games?
